---
title: "Strain vs B6"
output:
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(org.Mm.eg.db)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggprism)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(scales)
  library(patchwork)
  library(stringr)
  library(tools)
})
source("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/functions.R")  
pivot_to_wide <- function(path) {
  read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols     = c(ensembl_gene_id, symbol, description),
      names_from  = contrast,
      values_from = c(logFC, logCPM, F, PValue, FDR),
      names_sep   = "."
    )
}

brain_res  <- pivot_to_wide("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/brain.strain.B6.results.csv")
retina_res <- pivot_to_wide("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/retina.strain.B6.results.csv")
onh_res    <- pivot_to_wide("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/ONH.strain.B6.results.csv")
```

```{r ora-and-deg-counts, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
universes <- list(
  brain  = sym2entrez(brain_res$symbol),
  retina = sym2entrez(retina_res$symbol),
  onh    = sym2entrez(onh_res$symbol)
)

comp_defs <- list(
  list(tissue = "brain",  res = brain_res,  fc_col = "logFC.LPSinCASTrelativetoB6", strain = "CAST"),
  list(tissue = "brain",  res = brain_res,  fc_col = "logFC.LPSinWSBrelativetoB6",  strain = "WSB"),
  list(tissue = "brain",  res = brain_res,  fc_col = "logFC.LPSinNZOrelativetoB6",  strain = "NZO"),
  list(tissue = "retina", res = retina_res, fc_col = "logFC.LPSinCASTrelativetoB6", strain = "CAST"),
  list(tissue = "retina", res = retina_res, fc_col = "logFC.LPSinWSBrelativetoB6",  strain = "WSB"),
  list(tissue = "retina", res = retina_res, fc_col = "logFC.LPSinNZOrelativetoB6",  strain = "NZO"),
  list(tissue = "onh",    res = onh_res,    fc_col = "logFC.LPSinCASTrelativetoB6", strain = "CAST"),
  list(tissue = "onh",    res = onh_res,    fc_col = "logFC.LPSinWSBrelativetoB6",  strain = "WSB"),
  list(tissue = "onh",    res = onh_res,    fc_col = "logFC.LPSinNZOrelativetoB6",  strain = "NZO")
)

all_ora    <- list()
deg_counts <- vector("list", length(comp_defs))

for (i in seq_along(comp_defs)) {
  tissue <- comp_defs[[i]]$tissue
  res    <- comp_defs[[i]]$res
  fc_col <- comp_defs[[i]]$fc_col
  strain <- comp_defs[[i]]$strain

  fdr_col     <- sub("logFC\\.", "FDR.", fc_col)
  res_tmp     <- res
  res_tmp$FDR <- res_tmp[[fdr_col]]

  key  <- paste(tissue, strain, sep = "_")
  # lfc_cut = 0.5 (default): FDR <= 0.05 AND |logFC| >= 0.5
  degs <- extract_degs(res_tmp, fc_col, fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.5)

  all_ora[[paste0(key, "_up")]]   <- run_ora(degs$up,   universes[[tissue]])
  all_ora[[paste0(key, "_down")]] <- run_ora(degs$down, universes[[tissue]])

  deg_counts[[i]] <- data.frame(
    tissue = tools::toTitleCase(tissue),
    strain = strain,
    n_up   = degs$n_up,
    n_down = degs$n_down,
    total  = degs$n_up + degs$n_down
  )
}

deg_counts <- do.call(rbind, deg_counts)
deg_counts$tissue[deg_counts$tissue == "Onh"] <- "ONH"

outdir <- "/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/enrichment/"   # update path as needed
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE)
for (nm in names(all_ora)) {
  x <- all_ora[[nm]]
  if (is.null(x)) next
  df <- as.data.frame(x)
  if (!nrow(df)) next
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, GeneRatio, BgRatio, pvalue, p.adjust, Count, geneID) %>%
    mutate(comparison = nm, .before = 1)
  write.csv(df, file.path(outdir, paste0(nm, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
build_tissue_df <- function(tissue, top_n = 8, strains = c("CAST", "WSB", "NZO")) {
  rows <- list()
  for (strain in strains) {
    for (direction in c("up", "down")) {
      nm  <- paste(tissue, strain, direction, sep = "_")
      top <- get_top_terms(all_ora[[nm]], top_n)
      if (is.null(top)) next
      top$strain    <- strain
      top$direction <- if (direction == "up") "Higher than B6" else "Lower than B6"
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- top
    }
  }
  if (!length(rows)) return(NULL)
  df <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  df$Description_short <- shorten_term(df$Description)
  df$GR_num <- vapply(
    strsplit(df$GeneRatio, "/"),
    function(x) as.numeric(x[1]) / as.numeric(x[2]),
    numeric(1)
  )
  df
}

brain_df  <- build_tissue_df("brain")
retina_df <- build_tissue_df("retina")
onh_df    <- build_tissue_df("onh")
white_bg <- theme(
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  legend.key        = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
)
```

# ONH
```{r}
p_onh_bar <- make_deg_bar(deg_counts, "ONH","ONH: Strain-Specific LPS-Induced DEGs Relative to B6")
p_onh_dot <- make_dotplot(onh_df, "ONH: Strain-Specific LPS Response Relative to B6")
p_onh_bar
p_onh_dot
ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/Figure7A_onh_deg_bar.png",
       p_onh_bar, width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "grey92")
ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/Figure7B_onh_dotplot.png",
       p_onh_dot, width = 13, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


p_onh <- (p_onh_bar & white_bg) + (p_onh_dot & white_bg) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.4)) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 30)
    )
  )

p_onh
ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/onh_combined.png",
       p_onh, width = 22, height = 7, dpi = 500, bg = "white")
```

#Brain
```{r}
p_brain_bar <- make_deg_bar(deg_counts, "Brain",
                             "Brain: Strain-Specific LPS-Induced DEGs Relative to B6")
ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/Figure8A_brain_deg_bar.png",
       p_brain_bar, width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "grey92")
p_brain_bar

collagen_genes <- c("Ccn2", "Il6ra", "Rgcc", "Errfi1", "Arg1", "Itga2")

brain_long <- read.csv("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/brain.strain.B6.results.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

collagen_df <- brain_long %>%
  filter(symbol %in% collagen_genes, contrast == "LPSinNZOrelativetoB6") %>%
  arrange(logFC) %>%
  mutate(
    symbol    = factor(symbol, levels = symbol),
    sig       = FDR < 0.05,
    direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "Higher in NZO", "Lower in NZO")
  )

bg_col     <- "grey92"
dir_colors <- c("Higher in NZO" = "#009E73", "Lower in NZO" = "#D55E00")

p_collagen <- ggplot(collagen_df, aes(x = logFC, y = symbol, color = direction)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.9, color = "grey40", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = logFC, y = symbol, yend = symbol),
               linewidth = 1.5, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(size = -log10(FDR + 1e-10), shape = sig), stroke = 1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = dir_colors, name = "LPS response\nvs B6") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = 16, "FALSE" = 1),
    labels = c("TRUE" = "FDR < 0.05", "FALSE" = "FDR \u2265 0.05"),
    name   = "Significance"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name   = "-log(FDR)",
    range  = c(5, 12),
    breaks = c(2, 4, 6),
    guide  = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 16, color = "grey40"))
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Collagen Biosynthesis Genes: NZO LPS Response Relative to B6 (Brain)",
    
    x        = "Interaction logFC (NZO vs B6)",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.background   = element_rect(fill = bg_col, colour = NA),
    panel.background  = element_rect(fill = bg_col, colour = NA),
    axis.line         = element_line(linewidth = 1.1, colour = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x      = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 8)),
    plot.title        = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle     = element_text(size = 11, colour = "grey40", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_col, colour = NA),
    legend.key        = element_rect(fill = bg_col, colour = NA),
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.margin       = margin(t = 15, r = 20, b = 10, l = 20)
  )

ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/brain_collagen_NZO_logFC.png",
       p_collagen, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = bg_col)
p_collagen
```

```{r}
p_brain <- (p_brain_bar & white_bg) | (p_collagen & white_bg)
p_brain <- p_brain +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.4)) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(
      plot.tag        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 28),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
  )

ggsave(
  "/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/brain_combined.png",
  p_brain,
  width  = 18,
  height = 6,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "white"
)
```



#Retina 

```{r}
p_retina_bar <- make_deg_bar(deg_counts, "Retina", "Retina: Strain-Specific LPS-Induced DEGs Relative to B6")

p_retina_dot <- make_dotplot(retina_df, "Retina: Strain-Specific LPS Response Relative to B6")

p_retina_bar
p_retina_dot
# ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/retina_deg_bar.png",
#        p_retina_bar, width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "grey92")
# ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/retina_dotplot.png",
#        p_retina_dot, width = 13, height = 9, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

NZO <- make_rep_heatmap(
  nzo_rep,
  "NZO RGC Marker Genes (row z-score)",
  file.path(out_dir, "NZO_RGC_zscore_reps.png"),
  160
)

WSB <- make_rep_heatmap(
  wsb_rep,
  "WSB Photoreceptor Marker Genes (row z-score)",
  file.path(out_dir, "WSB_photoreceptors_zscore_reps.png"),
  260
)

p_retina <- (p_retina_bar + p_retina_dot) / (NZO + WSB) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 5.0), widths = c(1, 2.4)) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 28))
  ) & white_bg
p_retina

ggsave("/Users/temket/Desktop/LPS/Final_scripts/mod3/B6.relative/figs/retina_combined.png",
       p_retina, width = 22, height = 20, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```
